zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Lewis於1520年出生在威爾士安格萊時，他的父親Sir Edward Lewis ll20歲，母親Elizabeth Vaughn21歲。他於大約1535年與Gwladys Ferch Ieuan在威爾士格拉莫爾根利亞尼申結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1593年8月21日在威爾士凱爾納方史爾卡納福享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Lewis于1520年出生在威尔士安格萊时，他的父亲Sir Edward Lewis ll20岁，母亲Elizabeth Vaughn21岁。他于大约1535年与Gwladys Ferch Ieuan在威尔士格拉莫爾根利亞尼申结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1593年8月21日在威尔士凱爾納方史爾卡納福享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lewis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Lewis, Leweis, Lowis, from ancient Germanic (originally West Frankish) Hludwig (itself from hlōd- ‘fame, famous’ + wīg- ‘battle’). This was Latinized as Ludovicus and Chlodovisus, which were gallicized as Clovis or Clouis, French Louis. The name may also appear as Lawis, Laweys, Lawes, by unrounding of the vowel of Lowis on the analogy of the variation between Low and Law as pet forms of Middle English Lourence alias Laurence. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Laws 2 and compare Lawrence .
Welsh: adopted for the Welsh personal name Llywelyn (see Llewellyn ).

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh’. This is one of the most common Old Irish personal names. It is derived from Lugh ‘brightness’, which was the name of a Celtic god.

variants.name: Laws
meanings: English: variant of Law (pet form of Lawrence ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Perhaps a shortened form of Scottish or Irish   McLeish  . Compare   McLaws  .

variants.name: Lewison
meanings: Welsh and English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name   Lewis   (in Wales this was taken as equivalent to the Welsh personal name   Llewelyn  ). In North America, this surname has reportedly absorbed in some cases the Greek patronymic   Iliopoulos  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): patronymic from the personal name Lewi, Polish-influenced form of Levy .

variants.name: McGlew
meanings: Irish: most probably from Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh’, a Gaelic personal name (referencing the god Lugh), sometimes Anglicized as Lewis . However, both Woulfe and MacLysaght consider McGlew to be a shortened form of Mac Dhuinnshléibhe (see McAleavey and Dunleavy ).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Lewis was born in 1520, in Anglesey, Wales, his father, Sir Edward Lewis ll, was 20 and his mother, Elizabeth Vaughn, was 21. He married Gwladys Ferch Ieuan about 1535, in Llanishen, Glamorgan, Wales. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 21 August 1593, in Carnarvon, Caernarfonshire, Wales, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Lewis est né en 1520, à Anglesey, Galles, son père, Sir Edward Lewis ll, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Vaughn, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Gwladys Ferch Ieuan environ 1535, à Llanishen, Glamorgan, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 21 août 1593, à Carnarvon, Caernarfonshire, Galles, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Lewis 1520 in Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edward Lewis ll 20 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Vaughn 21. Er hat um 1535 in Llanishen, Glamorgan, Wales Gwladys Ferch Ieuan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 21. August 1593 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Carnarvon, Caernarfonshire, Wales.

Lui sposato Gwladys Ferch Ieuan circa 1535, nel Llanishen, Glamorgan, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 21 agosto 1593, nel Carnarvon, Caernarfonshire, Galles, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Lewisが1520年にウェールズアングレセイで生まれた時，父Sir Edward Lewis llは20歳，母Elizabeth Vaughnは21歳であった。約1535年にウェールズグラモーガンラニシェンでGwladys Ferch Ieuanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1593年8月21日にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアカーナルボンで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Lewis(이)가 1520년 웨일스 앤글레시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edward Lewis ll(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Vaughn(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1535년 웨일스 글램르건 랜이셰에서 Gwladys Ferch Ieuan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1593년 8월 21일 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 카른아르폰에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Gwladys Ferch Ieuan aproximadamente 1535, em Llanishen, Glamorgan, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 21 de agosto de 1593, em Carnarvon, Caernarfonshire, Gales, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Lewis родился в 1520 г. в местности англеси, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Sir Edward Lewis ll было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Vaughn, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwladys Ferch Ieuan около 1535 г. в местности лланишен, глэморган, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 21 августа 1593 г. в местности карнарвон, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Lewis nació en 1520, en Isla Oscura, Gales, su papá, Sir Edward Lewis ll, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Vaughn, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Gwladys Ferch Ieuan aproximadamente 1535, en Llanishen, Glamorgan, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 21 de agosto de 1593, en Carnarvon, Caernarfonshire, Gales, a la edad de 73 años.
